languages.text: "Господа судят своих слуг по поступкам. Я совершил достаточно, чтобы {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} фон Валанциус наделил меня титулом". {n}Здоровая часть лица Изимонда хранит совершенно непроницаемый вид.{/n} "Это лишь вопрос времени".
languages.translation_comment: Выдаем аддендум Obj1_Add_IzimondReasons и стартуем DL_KnowIzimondReasons

traits.locale_text: "Господа судят своих слуг по поступкам. Я совершил достаточно, чтобы {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} фон Валанциус наделил меня титулом". {n}Здоровая часть лица Изимонда хранит совершенно непроницаемый вид.{/n} "Это лишь вопрос времени".
traits.speaker: IzimondSauerback

languages.translation_comment: Выдаем аддендум Obj1_Add_IzimondReasons и стартуем DL_KnowIzimondReasons

languages.text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."
languages.original_text: "Господа судят своих слуг по поступкам. Я совершил достаточно, чтобы {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} фон Валанциус наделил меня титулом". {n}Здоровая часть лица Изимонда хранит совершенно непроницаемый вид.{/n} "Это лишь вопрос времени".

traits.locale_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

"Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for Rogue Trader von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

"Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for Rogue Trader von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

languages.text: «Los nobles juzgan a sus sirvientes por sus actos. He hecho lo suficiente para que el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} von Valancius me otorgue un título». {n}La parte intacta del rostro de Sauerback mantiene una expresión totalmente impenetrable.{/n} «Es solo cuestión de tiempo».
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: «Los nobles juzgan a sus sirvientes por sus actos. He hecho lo suficiente para que el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} von Valancius me otorgue un título». {n}La parte intacta del rostro de Sauerback mantiene una expresión totalmente impenetrable.{/n} «Es solo cuestión de tiempo».

languages.text: “贵族看重的，是仆从的功绩。我为{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}冯·瓦兰修斯立下的功劳，够让他封我个头衔了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克完好的那半张脸上，表情依旧让人捉摸不透。{/n}“这只是时间问题。”
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: “贵族看重的，是仆从的功绩。我为{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}冯·瓦兰修斯立下的功劳，够让他封我个头衔了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克完好的那半张脸上，表情依旧让人捉摸不透。{/n}“这只是时间问题。”

languages.text: « Les nobles jugent leurs subordonnés d'après leurs états de service. Les miens méritent amplement que le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} von Valancius m'accorde un titre. » {n}La partie intacte du visage d'Isimond Sauerback conserve une expression totalement impénétrable.{/n} « Ce n'est qu'une question de temps. »
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: « Les nobles jugent leurs subordonnés d'après leurs états de service. Les miens méritent amplement que le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} von Valancius m'accorde un titre. » {n}La partie intacte du visage d'Isimond Sauerback conserve une expression totalement impénétrable.{/n} « Ce n'est qu'une question de temps. »

languages.text: "Soylular, hizmetkârlarını eylemleriyle yargılar. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} von Valancius'un bana bir ünvan bahşetmesi için yeterince şey yaptım." {n}İsimond Sauerback'in yüzünün sağlam kısmı, tamamen nüfuz edilemez bir ifadeyi koruyor.{/n} "Artık sadece an meselesi."
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: "Soylular, hizmetkârlarını eylemleriyle yargılar. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} von Valancius'un bana bir ünvan bahşetmesi için yeterince şey yaptım." {n}İsimond Sauerback'in yüzünün sağlam kısmı, tamamen nüfuz edilemez bir ifadeyi koruyor.{/n} "Artık sadece an meselesi."

languages.text: "Adelige beurteilen ihre Diener nach ihren Taten. Ich habe genug getan, dass mir {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g} von Valancius einen Titel gewährt." {n}Der intakte Teil von Isimond Sauerbacks Gesicht behält einen absolut undurchdringlichen Ausdruck.{/n} "Das ist nur eine Frage der Zeit."
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: "Adelige beurteilen ihre Diener nach ihren Taten. Ich habe genug getan, dass mir {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}|Freihändlerin} von Valancius einen Titel gewährt." {n}Der intakte Teil von Isimond Sauerbacks Gesicht behält einen absolut undurchdringlichen Ausdruck.{/n}"Das ist nur eine Frage der Zeit."

languages.text: 「貴族は臣下をその行いによって判断する。私は、{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグトレーダー{/g}のフォン・ヴァランキウスのために十分なことをした。爵位を与えてくれるだろう。」{n}イシモンド・ザウアーバックの顔の残った部分は、完全に無表情である。{/n}「爵位を得る日は、そう遠くない。」
languages.original_text: "Nobles judge their servants by their deeds. I have done enough for {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} von Valancius to endow me with a title." {n}The intact portion of Isimond Sauerback's face maintains a completely impenetrable expression.{/n} "It is only a matter of time."

traits.locale_text: 「貴族は臣下をその行いによって判断する。私は、{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグトレーダー{/g}のフォン・ヴァランキウスのために十分なことをした。爵位を与えてくれるだろう。」{n}イシモンド・ザウアーバックの顔の残った部分は、完全に無表情である。{/n}「爵位を得る日は、そう遠くない。」
